features.featureTitle: In LocationSection.tsx, fix the Google Maps iframe so it correctly displays the map centered on the right coordinates for Dwarka Bartan Store, Akhnoor Palace, Jammu. The iframe embed URL must use a proper Google Maps embed URL (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=... or the /embed?q= variant) that points accurately to the store's location at Akhnoor Palace, Jammu — not a generic or incorrect pin. The 'Get Directions' button must continue to link to https://maps.app.goo.gl/oxEd9nPJ4Ty4pYQL7. Verify the iframe renders the map at the correct physical position visually.
